title: Ethiopian Teppan Injera Bread
description: A traditional Ethiopian injera bread made on a teppan grill, perfect for sopping up stews and salads.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the yeast, iron on, and teppan roast.
2. Add the ethiopian action, fast teppan, and injera yeast to the bowl.
3. Mix the ingredients together until a smooth batter forms.
4. Heat the teppan to medium-high heat.
5. Pour the batter onto the teppan and spread it out evenly.
6. Cook the injera for 1-2 minutes on each side, until it's lightly browned and puffed.
7. Brush the teppan ethiopian over the injera.
8. Repeat the process to make additional injera breads.
9. Serve the injera warm, perfect for sopping up stews and salads.
10. Store any leftover injera in an airtight container for up to 2 days.
